name: Dorothy's Easy Do Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, cream together the butter and powdered sugar.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (flour, egg, vanilla, salt) to the bowl.
3. Mix at low speed until the dough is formed.
4. Cover the bowl and chill for several hours.
When ready to make cookies:
1. Shape into 1-inch balls.
2. Roll in colored sugar if desired.
3. Flatten the balls and decorate.
Alternatively, roll out the dough and cut with cookie cutters.
Or, as I do, load the dough into a cookie press and extrude into various shapes.
4. Decorate the cookies as desired.
5. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet at 375°F for 10-12 minutes.
6. The cookies will be soft and harden as they cool.
